name: Mama Mia Pizza Dough
recipeIngredient: Bread flour, 2 1/2 c (up to 3 c as needed for dough ball)
Garlic powder, 1/8 tsp (add more for stronger garlic flavor)
Warm beer, 1 cup (room temperature beer zapped in microwave for a few seconds)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine yeast and warm beer.
2. Add bread flour gradually until dough forms a smooth ball.
3. Knead the dough on a floured surface until elastic, about 10 minutes.
4. Place the dough in an oiled bowl, cover, and let it rise until doubled in size, about 1 hour.
5. Punch down the dough and shape into two 12-inch pies.
